title: January 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 22''' is the 22nd day of the year. 343 days (344 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Olivia d'Abo]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 34|''Star Wars'' (1977) 34]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[It's a Trap]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] concludes.
*[[1990]] – [[Bobby Hall]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Jedi Search]]'' [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|UK]] abridged cassette released.
*[[2000]] – [[Craig Claiborne]] dies.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 4: Screams in the Void]]'' published.
*2003 – [[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Lightsaber Lost]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2010 – ''[[Timeline 6: Onslaught of the Sith Empire]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2014]] – [[Legacy (2013) 11|''Legacy'' (2013) 11]] released.
*2014 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 3 (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 3'']] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' Takeover occurs on Disney's ''[[Club Penguin]]''.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' releases the full trailer for [[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|Season 7]].
*[[2021]] – [[C-3PO (reference book)|''C-3PO'']] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Last Stand 4|''Battle of Jakku — Last Stand'' 4]] published.
*[[2026]] – [[Chewie and the Porgs (audiobook)|''Chewie and the Porgs'' audiobook]] released.
